user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to view candidates who can refuse an offer in a list with all candidate details, so that I can track refused offers
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Refuse Offer screen; When the list loads; Then candidates in the refuse-offer stage are shown with all documented columns

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to search candidates by name, so that I can locate a specific refused-offer candidate
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Refuse Offer screen; When I enter a candidate name and search; Then only matching candidates are listed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to refresh the list, so that I see current refuse-offer records
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Refuse Offer screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to navigate to other hiring stage filters, so that I can move between pipeline stages from the Refuse Offer view
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Refuse Offer screen; When I select a stage filter button; Then the list updates to that stage with its candidate count
